Axar Patel Challenges Captaincy Bias

Nov 14, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Axar Patel Challenges Captaincy Bias

India’s all-rounder Axar Patel has openly questioned perceived biases in captaincy selections and leadership roles within the team, calling for more transparency in how captains are chosen.
